/soft/libraries/mpi/openmpi/4.1.1/bin/mpicxx -DNO_INFORM -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/serial_test.dir/miniWeather_serial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/serial_test.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o serial_test   -L/soft/compilers/cuda/cuda-12.3.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  /soft/compilers/cuda/cuda-12.3.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcufft.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -ldl
